scripts.build:mobile-web: rm -rf public/app && mkdir -p public/app && sh -c 'if command -v dotenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then dotenv -e ../../.env -- sh -c "EXPO_BASE_URL=app npm --prefix ../mobile run web:build -- --output-dir ../dashboard/public/app"; else EXPO_BASE_URL=app npm --prefix ../mobile run web:build -- --output-dir ../dashboard/public/app; fi'
